prompt: Create a vintage fantasy travel postcard poster for {argument name="location name" default="BEACON HOLLOW"}, designed like a large-letter souvenir postcard from the 1950s–1960s. The composition is a single richly detailed horizontal scene with heavily weathered paper texture, rounded postcard corners, faded inks, creases, scratches, foxing, and worn edges. Across the top and center, huge dimensional block letters spell “BEACON HOLLOW” in classic retro postcard style, with warm cream outlines and red-brown extruded shadows; each letter contains miniature painted scenic vignettes of the destination, including alpine peaks, waterfalls, pine forests, a magical manor, glowing towers, and valley landscapes. In the upper left, hand-painted script text reads “GREETINGS FROM” in dark red. In the upper right, include a circular black postal cancellation stamp reading “BEACON HOLLOW / MAY 18 / 1967 / CREATIVE RETREAT,” overlapping a vintage postage stamp labeled “BEACON HOLLOW” and “CREATIVE RETREAT” with “7c,” depicting a moonlit mountain and a lighthouse-like beacon tower. Beneath the title, place a small curved ribbon banner reading {argument name="tagline" default="a magejosh destination"} with tiny compass-star ornaments. The main background should show a majestic golden-hour mountain valley with a winding river, distant snowy peaks, dense evergreen forests, and on the right a large timber-and-stone fantasy lodge perched on a cliff, warmly lit from within, with stairs descending the slope. Scatter subtle magical blue lights and faint arcane circular glyphs around the lodge and foreground for a worldbuilding-meets-magic atmosphere. In the lower left, place exactly 3 foreground desk objects: a dark ceramic mug with a compass emblem, an open sketchbook spread, and a fountain pen resting diagonally across the pages. The left page of the sketchbook is titled “Campaign Ideas” and lists 3 bullets: “The Forgotten Vale,” “Clockwork Pilgrims,” and “Echoes of the First Light,” with a small castle drawing below; the right page shows a tree illustration and the handwritten text “Beery world Hollow.” Across the lower center, add an old illustrated map spread out on the table, showing mountain icons and hand-drawn cartographic details. In the lower right, place exactly 5 more foreground elements: a closed leather journal embossed with a star compass and the phrase “Ideas Become Legends,” a cluster of 4 polyhedral dice, a rustic wooden signpost with 4 directional slats reading “STORY,” “GAME DESIGN,” “WORLD BUILDING,” and “AI FOR CREATORS,” a glowing glass lamp or tube device, and a nearby floating arcane target-like sigil. Add a pinned handwritten note left of center on aged paper reading, “Wish you were here — building worlds, chasing wonder, and turning ideas into adventures. — {argument name="signature name" default="magejosh"}” in blue cursive. Use painterly illustration with high detail, nostalgic Americana postcard design, fantasy concept art sensibility, warm sunset lighting, muted teal sky, sepia aging, and an inviting creative-retreat mood.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张关于 {argument name="location name" default="BEACON HOLLOW"} 的复古奇幻旅行明信片海报，设计风格参考 20 世纪 50 年代至 60 年代的大字纪念明信片。构图为单幅细节丰富的横向场景，带有严重的纸张风化纹理、圆角明信片边缘、褪色的油墨、折痕、划痕、霉斑和磨损边缘。在顶部和中心，巨大的立体块状字母拼写出“BEACON HOLLOW”，采用经典的复古明信片风格，带有温暖的奶油色轮廓和红棕色浮雕阴影；每个字母内都包含目的地的小型风景插画，包括高山峰峦、瀑布、松林、魔法庄园、发光的塔楼和山谷景观。左上角有深红色的手绘草书文字“GREETINGS FROM”。右上角包含一个圆形的黑色邮戳，上面写着“BEACON HOLLOW / MAY 18 / 1967 / CREATIVE RETREAT”，并覆盖在一张标有“BEACON HOLLOW”和“CREATIVE RETREAT”以及“7c”的复古邮票上，邮票描绘了月光下的山脉和灯塔般的信标塔。在标题下方，放置一条弯曲的小丝带横幅，上面写着 {argument name="tagline" default="a magejosh destination"}，并带有微小的罗盘星装饰。主体背景应展示一个壮丽的黄金时刻山谷，有蜿蜒的河流、远处的雪峰、茂密的常绿森林，右侧悬崖上坐落着一座巨大的木石结构奇幻小屋，内部灯火通明，楼梯沿坡而下。在小屋和前景周围散布微妙的魔法蓝光和淡淡的奥术圆形符号，营造出世界观构建与魔法交织的氛围。左下角放置 3 个前景桌面物品：一个带有罗盘标志的深色陶瓷马克杯、一本打开的素描本，以及一支斜放在页面上的钢笔。素描本左页标题为“Campaign Ideas”，列出 3 个要点：“The Forgotten Vale”、“Clockwork Pilgrims”和“Echoes of the First Light”，下方有一幅小城堡画；右页展示了一幅树木插图和手写文字“Beery world Hollow”。在底部中心，添加一张铺在桌上的旧地图，显示山脉图标和手绘地图细节。右下角放置 5 个前景元素：一本压印有星形罗盘和短语“Ideas Become Legends”的封闭式皮革日志、一堆 4 颗多面骰子、一个质朴的木制路标，上面有 4 个方向条，分别写着“STORY”、“GAME DESIGN”、“WORLD BUILDING”和“AI FOR CREATORS”、一个发光的玻璃灯或管状装置，以及附近一个漂浮的奥术靶心符号。在中心偏左处钉上一张写在陈旧纸张上的手写便条，用蓝色草书写着：“Wish you were here — building worlds, chasing wonder, and turning ideas into adventures. — {argument name="signature name" default="magejosh"}”。采用绘画风格，细节丰富，具有怀旧的美国明信片设计感、奇幻概念艺术感、温暖的日落光影、柔和的青色天空、深褐色陈旧感以及引人入胜的创意静修氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: Beacon Hollow 复古奇幻明信片：此提示词可生成一张用于奇幻目的地的复古风旅行明信片插画，非常适合创意世界观宣传、虚构旅游艺术或怀旧品牌概念设计。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: vintage, retro, fantasy, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
